member.name: T:Dreamine.Database.Core.Mapping.DatabaseEntityMap
member.summary: Describes database mapping metadata for an entity type.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Database.Core.Mapping.DatabaseEntityMap.Key
member.summary: Gets the mapped key property, if one exists.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Database.Core.Mapping.DatabaseEntityMap.InsertableProperties
member.summary: Gets properties that can be included in insert statements.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Database.Core.Mapping.DatabaseEntityMap.UpdatableProperties
member.summary: Gets properties that can be included in update statements.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Core.Mapping.DatabaseEntityMap.Create``1
member.summary: Creates or retrieves mapping metadata for an entity type.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Core.Mapping.DatabaseEntityMap.Create(System.Type)
member.summary: Creates or retrieves mapping metadata for an entity type.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Database.Core.Mapping.DatabasePropertyMap
member.summary: Describes database mapping metadata for an entity property.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Database.Core.Mapping.DatabasePropertyMap.ColumnName
member.summary: Gets the mapped database column name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Database.Core.Mapping.DatabasePropertyMap.PropertyType
member.summary: Gets the non-nullable CLR property type used for database type mapping.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Database.Core.Mapping.DatabasePropertyMap.IsKey
member.summary: Gets whether the property is the entity key.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Database.Core.Mapping.DatabasePropertyMap.IsGenerated
member.summary: Gets whether the property value is generated by the database.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Core.Mapping.DatabasePropertyMap.Create(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Creates mapping metadata for a CLR property.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Database.Core.Providers.DatabaseProviderBase
member.summary: Provides a base implementation for Dreamine database providers.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
